title: Which Evangelion is the most powerful
display_title: Which Evangelion is the most powerful
wikitext:
[]: Which Evangelion is the most powerful?             Quote Post by tijgersprong » Tue Nov 06, 2018 3:36 am So I've been discussing this topic with my best friend for a while now. He is a firm believer that Mark.09 can easily outperform all the other Evangelion units, whilst I'm more inclined to believe that Mark.06 is one of the most advanced units out there. So what do you guys think? And which unit is your favorite? (Btw, sorry if this topic already exists. I looked for one but none showed up )

[]: Re: Which Evangelion is the most powerful?             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Nov 07, 2018 12:42 pm Talking about absolute peak power: Following the rather vague semi-evolution phase system, Eva 13 was able to reach the third stage by turning white at the end of Q, with Unit 01 being second, reaching phase 2 at the end of Ha. "Default" power: Unit 01 would be the first that comes to my mind, having shown quit significant strength both physically and in AT field when let off the leash, but I have to throw in Eva 13 as well here, for taking two Lances of Longinus like it was nothing and only deactivating when both pilots are either dead or ejected. Might be a three-way tie with Mark.06, but we have seen too little of it to give a definitive answer to that

[]: Re: Which Evangelion is the most powerful?             Quote Post by Joseki » Wed Nov 07, 2018 1:30 pm Probably Unit 01 piloted by Shinji considering the stuff it can do in EoE and how everyone was scared of it in 3.33.
